name: Password Reset
description: Sends a password reset link via email. Single-step, security-focused.

body.en:
Hi {{default "there" .Subscriber.FirstName}},

We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to set a new one:

Reset password

This link expires in {{.Payload.expiresInMinutes}} minutes. If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.
